title: papaver somniferum subsp. opiiferum
intro: Papaver somniferum subsp. opiiferum, also known as opium poppy, is a subspecies of the opium poppy plant, derived from the same species as the common poppy (Papaver somniferum). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include pain relief, sedation, and cough suppression due to the presence of alkaloids such as morphine and codeine. The health benefits of opium poppy include relief from moderate to severe pain, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety. Herbal preparations of opium poppy, such as extracts and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although these should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to the potential for addiction.
